title: Ubiquiti Gateway Max
description: Ubiquiti Gateway Max is a versatile device. It has (4) LAN 1/2.5 Gbps ports and (1) WAN 2.5 Gbps port. The gateway also supports IDS/IPS with routing speeds up to 1.5 Gbps. For better your privacy and security on the internet, it supports VPN from WireGuard , L2TP , and OpenVPN . The device is suitable for small to medium-sized businesses. The gateway is powered through USB-C IDS/IPS support VPN support (WireGuard, OpenVPN, L2TP) High port speed of 2.5 Gbps Device Power adapter including cable
